store.name: Wind & Wire Field Supply
store.tagline: Field recording kits for musicians collecting sound outdoors
store.customer: Sample-based musicians, ambient artists, experimental composers, podcast sound designers, nature recordists with music instincts, audio hobbyists, and students building a first portable audio kit

collections.name: Starter field kits
collections.description: Ready-to-pack kits built around the field bag instead of scattered pro-audio, camera-rig, outdoor, and DIY electronics carts.

products.name: First Field Recorder Bag
products.summary: Handheld recorder foundation with foam, furry windshield, monitoring, cable labels, battery planning, and a take-log notebook.

products.name: Urban Texture Kit
products.summary: Compact setup for alleys, train platforms, mechanical pulse, and found rhythm.

products.name: Nature Ambience Kit
products.summary: Long-session outdoor kit for dawn beds, trail ambience, and quieter environmental material.

products.name: Contact-Mic Discovery Kit
products.summary: A first resonant-surface kit for turning fences, rails, benches, signs, and scrap into source material.

products.name: Rainy-Day Capture Bundle
products.summary: Wet-weather protection and boundary pickup for rainy-window texture and protected outdoor sessions.

collections.name: Capture hardware
collections.description: Compact microphones and recorders for surfaces, spaces, water, and portable stereo capture.

products.name: Pocket XY Stereo Mic
products.summary: Quick ambience, motion, and room tone capture without carrying a full rig.

products.name: Found-Percussion Contact Pair
products.summary: Contact mics for fences, rails, benches, signs, and resonant scrap.

products.name: Harbor Drop Hydrophone
products.summary: Waterline capture for harbor movement, drainage echoes, dock slap, and submerged motion.

products.name: Rain Glass Boundary Pickup
products.summary: Place-and-wait pickup for windows, tables, panels, and rainy indoor/outdoor edges.

collections.name: Wind and handling control
collections.description: Protection and isolation for wind, hand movement, cable bumps, and quick placement.

products.name: Furry Windshield Field Pair
products.summary: Furry windshields for exposed streets, docks, trailheads, and blustery open spaces.

products.name: Foam Screen Multipack
products.summary: Foam screens for indoor drafts, mild exterior air, and backup capsule protection.

products.name: Soft Recorder Wrap
products.summary: Wrap a handheld recorder to reduce bag rub and incidental handling noise.

products.name: Suspension Clip and Pistol Grip Set
products.summary: Keep capsules isolated while moving through platforms, piers, alleys, and street corners.

collections.name: Field-bag infrastructure
collections.description: Cables, power, pouches, memory organization, and small tools that keep sessions from falling apart.

products.name: Right-Angle Field Cable Set
products.summary: Short coiled runs, right-angle adapters, and labels for cleaner recorder-bag routing.

products.name: Storm Pouch Trio
products.summary: Weatherproof pouches sized for recorder, power, and memory cards.

products.name: Long-Take Battery Plan
products.summary: Rechargeable battery set, small power bank, and session planning card.

products.name: Memory Card Case + Sample Sleeves
products.summary: Separate blank, used, copied, and release-ready material in the field bag.

collections.name: Logging and listening tools
collections.description: Monitoring, notebooks, slate cards, labels, gain guides, and archive materials for making outdoor sound usable later.

products.name: Closed-Back Field Monitors
products.summary: Portable closed-back monitoring for gain decisions and noise checks outside the studio.

products.name: Field Take Notebook
products.summary: Notebook pages shaped for location, mic, gain, weather, and musical-use notes.

products.name: Slate Card and Washable Label Pack
products.summary: Reusable cards and labels for take IDs, location notes, and bag organization.

products.name: Gain-Setting Cheat Cards
products.summary: Quick reference cards for setting levels before wind, traffic, or rain changes the scene.

collections.name: Scenario bundles
collections.description: Focused packs for specific outdoor recording situations.

products.name: Subway Rhythm Pack
products.summary: Compact stereo capture, handling isolation, and cable discipline for transit rhythms and metallic transients.

products.name: Forest Dawn Pack
products.summary: Wind layers, long power, quiet monitoring, and logging tools for dawn ambience.

products.name: Harbor Hydrophone Pack
products.summary: Hydrophone, weather protection, monitoring, and labels for creaking piers and harbor edges.

products.name: Found-Percussion Contact Pack
products.summary: Contact mics, clips, adapters, and archive sleeves for turning resonant objects into instruments.

products.name: Travel-Light Carry-On Pack
products.summary: A compact bag plan with recorder protection, power, cable control, and logging tools for portable sessions.
